extract: Cinderace (Japanese: エースバーン Aceburn) is a Fire-type Pokémon introduced in Generation VIII. It evolves from Raboot starting at level 35. It is the final form of Scorbunny. Cinderace can Gigantamax into Gigantamax Cinderace if it has the Gigantamax Factor. Gigantamax Cinderace was introduced in The Isle of Armor.
